title: One Thousand and One Nights
author: The Arabian Nights
description: Richard Francis Burton's "1001 Nights" is a captivating translation and retelling of the famed Middle Eastern collection of folk tales, also known as the "Arabian Nights." Burton'Äôs rendition breathes new life into the ancient narratives with his signature style, which marries scholarly rigor with a poetic sensibility.
